UserManagement.title: User management
UserManagement.errorSelfDemotion: You cannot remove your own administrator privileges.

Member.noAccessDescription: Your account is active, but you don't have access to any features yet. Talk to an administrator to get permissions.

Member.accessDenied: You don't have permission to access this page.

PeopleManagement.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

PeopleManagement.errorUserAlreadyLinked: This account is already linked to another person.

RoleManagement.errorInvalidSlots: The number of slots must be a positive whole number.
RoleManagement.errorDuplicateName: A role with this name already exists.

RoleManagement.confirmRemoveInUse: This role is associated with {count, plural, one {# person} other {# people}}. Remove anyway?

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Claim.title: Are you one of these people?
Claim.instructions: Select your name from the list, or choose "{skipButton}" to continue without linking.
Claim.errorAlreadyClaimed: That person has already been linked to another account. Choose another name or skip this step.
Claim.errorAlreadyLinked: Your account is already linked to another person. Refresh the page and try again.
Claim.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Claim.noRecordsDescription: There isn't a team record for you yet. Ask an Admin to add you to the team (Equipa) or link your account to an existing record.

SkillManagement.emptyRoles: No roles configured yet. Create a role first.
SkillManagement.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Availability.title: Your availability
Availability.instructions: Tap a Sunday to mark it unavailable. Tap it again to mark it available.
Availability.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Availability.loadError: Could not load your availability. Please try again later.
Availability.noLinkedPersonDescription: To manage your availability, first link your account to your name on the team.
